root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_group_name , sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date , '!operate_date_1!'as from_date , '!operate_date_2!'as to_date , sc_mem_m_chang_request.remark , (case when sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = '10' then 'มีหุ้นอยู่ในเกณฑ์ข้อบังคับของสหกรณ์' when sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = '11' then 'เกษียณอายุราชการก่อนกำหนด' when sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = '12' then 'เกษียณอายุราชการครบ 60 ปี' when sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = '13' then 'ลาออกจากราชการ/ย้ายราชการไปต่างจังหวัด' end)as reason , sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old , (select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sum(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old))::double precision) from sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_chang_request where sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code in ('10','11','12','13') /*WHERE*/ ) as sum_shr_value_old_thai , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_sharestock from sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code in ('10','11','12','13') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
